animation_types.description: Transition d'opacité progressive de 0 à 1, douce et élégante
animation_types.easing: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) ou ease-out
animation_types.emotion: Douceur, élégance, non-invasif, universel
animation_types.avoid_when: Trop utilisé = fade devient invisible, préférer combiner avec movement
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } .element { animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-out; }
animation_types.accessibility: Respecter prefers-reduced-motion: reduce { animation: none; }
animation_types.tips: Combiner avec delay pour stagger effect, idéal pour listes

animation_types.description: Élément apparaît en montant verticalement (transform translateY), révélation progressive
animation_types.emotion: Dynamisme, énergie, révélation, découverte
animation_types.avoid_when: Mobile avec motion sickness (prefers-reduced-motion), trop vite = janky
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes slideUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .element { animation: slideUp 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); }
animation_types.accessibility: Paramétrer media query pour désactiver si needed
animation_types.tips: Combiner translateY + opacity pour effet premium, delay entre éléments = stagger

animation_types.description: Élément grandit ou rétrécit via transform scale(), crée focus/attention immédiate
animation_types.timing: 300-500ms pour in, 200-400ms pour out
animation_types.easing: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) pour zoom in (bounce-like), ease-out pour zoom out
animation_types.emotion: Impact, attention, importância, énergie explosive
animation_types.avoid_when: Trop d'échelles simultanées = confusion visuelle, motion sickness si > 600ms
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes scaleIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.8); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } } .element { animation: scaleIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); }
animation_types.accessibility: Éviter scale > 1.3 si animation rapide (peut créer vertigo)
animation_types.tips: Scale 0.95 = subtle, scale 0.5 = dramatic; combiner avec other props pour richesse

animation_types.description: Décaler les animations de plusieurs éléments dans le temps (délai croissant), crée un effet domino
animation_types.timing: 50-150ms de délai entre éléments, durée totale 400-800ms
animation_types.easing: same as base animation (fade/slide)
animation_types.emotion: Rythme, orchestration, contrôle, sophistication
animation_types.avoid_when: Trop de délai = perte de patience user, impatience sur mobile
animation_types.css_snippet: .item { animation: slideUp 0.5s ease-out forwards; } .item:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0ms; } .item:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 100ms; } .item:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 200ms; }
animation_types.accessibility: Total duration < 1s sinon risque de distraction excessive
animation_types.tips: Utiliser Framer Motion staggerChildren = plus simple et performant

animation_types.description: Révélation par masque qui s'ouvre (clip-path ou mask), cinématique, premium
animation_types.timing: 600-1000ms pour effet cinéma, 300-400ms pour quick reveal
animation_types.easing: ease-out ou cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)
animation_types.emotion: Cinéma, premium, découverte progressive, anticipation
animation_types.avoid_when: Si contenu simple (juste du texte) = overkill, perf sur mobile ancien
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes revealClip { from { clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); } to { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); } } .element { animation: revealClip 0.8s ease-out; }
animation_types.performance_cost: medium (clip-path peut être lourd sur mobile)
animation_types.accessibility: Assurer texte dispo même sans animation (semantic HTML first)
animation_types.tips: Combiner clip-path + transform + opacity = effet cinéma haut de gamme

animation_types.description: Éléments se déplacent à vitesses différentes lors du scroll, crée profondeur 3D
animation_types.timing: Continu pendant scroll, vitesse relative 0.3x - 0.7x du scroll
animation_types.easing: Linear (maintien vitesse constante relative au scroll)
animation_types.emotion: Profondeur, luxe, immersion, sophistication technique
animation_types.avoid_when: Performance mobile faible, préférer background-attachment: fixed; ou transform: translateZ
animation_types.css_snippet: .parallax-bg { background-attachment: fixed; background-size: cover; } /* Modern: use transform */ .parallax { transform: translateY(calc(var(--scroll) * 0.5px)); }
animation_types.performance_cost: high (si mal optimisé), medium avec transform
animation_types.accessibility: Désactiver si prefers-reduced-motion, sinon risque vertigo/nausea
animation_types.tips: Utiliser transform (translateY) et requestAnimationFrame, JAMAIS reflow CSS

animation_types.description: Animation déclenche quand élément entre viewport au scroll, activation au fil du scroll
animation_types.timing: 300-800ms pour animation lors du trigger, peut être très long (2s+) pour effet épique
animation_types.easing: ease-out généralement, cubic-bezier custom pour effet spécifique
animation_types.emotion: Storytelling, activation progressive, discovery, engagement narratif
animation_types.avoid_when: Trop de triggers = fatigue cognitive, mobile low-end perf issues
animation_types.css_snippet: /* GSAP ScrollTrigger */ gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger); gsap.to('.element', { scrollTrigger: '.element', opacity: 1, duration: 0.8 });
animation_types.accessibility: Tester avec keyboard-only, assurer pas de contenu obligatoire caché sans animation
animation_types.tips: Utiliser Intersection Observer natif pour perf, GSAP ScrollTrigger pour complexity

animation_types.description: Élément reste fixe dans viewport lors du scroll, puis se détache (position: sticky)
animation_types.timing: N/A (aucun timing, c'est positional), offset top ajustable
animation_types.easing: N/A (pas d'animation, mouvement physique)
animation_types.emotion: Contexte permanent, navigation persistent, importance hiérarchique
animation_types.avoid_when: Trop d'éléments sticky = perte d'espace, confusion mobile, content overflow
animation_types.css_snippet: .sticky-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; background: white; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
animation_types.accessibility: S'assurer sticky ne bloque pas interaction, tester avec zoom 200%
animation_types.tips: position: sticky + top: 0 = plus simple et performant; JAMAIS position: fixed sur contenu

animation_types.description: Section snaps en place lors du scroll (scroll-snap-type), fullscreen sections ou panes
animation_types.timing: N/A (timing natif browser), snap-stop immediate
animation_types.easing: Browser-native smooth scroll (si scroll-behavior: smooth;)
animation_types.emotion: Mobile-native, intentional, section-based navigation, clarity
animation_types.avoid_when: Desktop experience préférer scroll fluide, si trop de snaps (>5) = frustration
animation_types.css_snippet: .scroll-container { scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; overflow-y: scroll; } .section { scroll-snap-align: start; height: 100vh; }
animation_types.accessibility: Assurer clavier navigation works (arrow keys), JAMAIS forcer snap sans accès clavier
animation_types.tips: Combiner avec scroll-behavior: smooth pour UX meilleur, scroll-snap-stop: always pour strictness

animation_types.description: Zoom très lent (0.5x - 2x) et pan subtle sur photo/image, cinématique lent et émotionnel
animation_types.timing: 8-15 secondes pour effet épique, 3-5s pour subtle
animation_types.easing: linear (vitesse constante = cinéma), cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) pour variation
animation_types.emotion: Cinéma, épopée, émotionnel, temps suspendu, contemplation
animation_types.avoid_when: Sur petites images, si motion parallels exist, sur images avec texte overlay (confusing)
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes kenBurns { from { transform: scale(1) translate(0, 0); } to { transform: scale(1.1) translate(10px, -10px); } } .hero-image { animation: kenBurns 12s ease-out forwards; }
animation_types.accessibility: Tester que texte overlay reste lisible, désactiver si prefers-reduced-motion
animation_types.tips: Ken Burns + slow fade text = cinéma haut de gamme; utiliser avec musique de fond

animation_types.description: Animation lors du changement de page/route (fade, slide, wipe), orchestration entière
animation_types.timing: 200-400ms pour transition rapide, 500-800ms pour transition cinéma
animation_types.easing: ease-in-out pour smoothness (cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1))
animation_types.emotion: Continuité narrative, fluidité, sophistication, contexte transitionnel
animation_types.avoid_when: Trop lent (> 800ms) = impatience, si trop fréquent (chaque action) = noise
animation_types.css_snippet: /* Next.js 16 avec Client Components */ 'use client'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; export default function Page() { return (<motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}>Content</motion.div>); }
animation_types.accessibility: Assurer loading states visible, pas d'animation si prefers-reduced-motion
animation_types.tips: Combiner exit + entry animations = plus fluide; Framer Motion layoutId pour shared layout animation

animation_types.description: Animation au hover sur boutons/cards/images (color shift, scale, underline, shadow)
animation_types.timing: 150-250ms pour feedback rapide et satisfying
animation_types.easing: ease-out (cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94))
animation_types.emotion: Responsivité, affordance, invite à interaction, clarté CTAs
animation_types.avoid_when: Mobile (pas de hover) = TOUJOURS fallback active state, trop baroque = perte focus
animation_types.css_snippet: button { transition: all 0.2s ease-out; } button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
animation_types.accessibility: Assurer :active state identical (mobile), maintenir sufficient contrast
animation_types.tips: translateY(-2px) + shadow = professional look; JAMAIS color-only affordance (colorblind friendly)

animation_types.description: Animation placeholder (skeleton, spinner, progress bar) pendant async operation
animation_types.timing: Spinner: 1-2s repeat, skeleton: no animation or pulsing 1.5s, progress: varies by operation
animation_types.easing: Linear pour spinner (constant rotation), ease-out pour progress bar
animation_types.emotion: Transparence, feedback, patience-building, trust
animation_types.avoid_when: Jamais pas de loading state = mauvaise UX, spinner trop rapide = anxiety
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .spinner { animation: spin 1s linear infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } .skeleton { animation: pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
animation_types.accessibility: aria-busy="true" sur container, accessible label pour spinner
animation_types.tips: Skeleton > spinner pour UX meilleur (montre structure), progress bar pour time-aware operations

animation_types.description: Ouverture/fermeture menu (slide, fade, backdrop blur), orchestration entrance/exit
animation_types.timing: 250-400ms pour ouverture, 150-250ms pour fermeture
animation_types.easing: ease-out pour ouverture (responsive), ease-in pour fermeture (quick)
animation_types.emotion: Accessibilité, clarté navigation, hierarchy disclosure
animation_types.avoid_when: Menu stick (position: fixed) sans proper z-index/backdrop handling, trop lent > 400ms
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes slideInMenu { from { transform: translateX(-100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } } .menu-open { animation: slideInMenu 0.3s ease-out; }
animation_types.accessibility: ARIA-labels, keyboard navigation (Escape close), focus management
animation_types.tips: Combiner slide + backdrop blur (semi-transparent) = premium look, Framer Motion AnimatePresence pour cleanup

animation_types.description: Feedback immédiat click: press (scale shrink), ripple (Material Design), bounce (playful)
animation_types.timing: 100-150ms pour press, 200-400ms pour ripple spread, 300-500ms pour bounce
animation_types.easing: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) pour bounce (overshoot), ease-out pour press
animation_types.emotion: Satisfication immédiate, feedback, affordance claire, joie subtile
animation_types.avoid_when: Buttons très formels (legal, critical), excessive ripple distraction
animation_types.css_snippet: button:active { transform: scale(0.98); } /* Press feedback */ @keyframes bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } } button:active { animation: bounce 0.3s ease-out; }
animation_types.accessibility: Assurer :active same effect comme :hover (keyboard users), JAMAIS rely only on animation
animation_types.tips: Bounce (translate) > scale pour effect meilleur, combine avec sound fx optional (delight)

animation_types.description: Feedback validation (success check mark, error shake, warning icon highlight)
animation_types.timing: Error shake: 400-600ms, success: 300-500ms reveal, warning: 200-300ms highlight
animation_types.easing: ease-out pour success, cubic-bezier pour shake (oscillation)
animation_types.emotion: Clarity, error prevention, instant feedback, confidence
animation_types.avoid_when: Trop d'animations = visual noise, shake trop intense = motion sickness
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes shake { 0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); } 25% { transform: translateX(-10px); } 75% { transform: translateX(10px); } } input.error { animation: shake 0.5s ease-out; border-color: #ef4444; }
animation_types.accessibility: aria-invalid="true", error message in aria-describedby, color NOT only differentiator
animation_types.tips: Success = slide in checkmark + fade out; error = shake + red border + text message combo

animation_types.description: Burst particle animation heart/star avec pop animation et confetti, Instagram/Twitter style
animation_types.timing: 400-600ms pour burst principal, 500-800ms pour particle fade out
animation_types.easing: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) pour burst (spring), ease-out pour particles
animation_types.emotion: Joie, satisfaction, delight, engagement, fun
animation_types.avoid_when: Professionnel strict context (finance, legal), overuse fatigue
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes heartBurst { 0% { transform: scale(0); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0; } } .heart-particle { animation: heartBurst 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) forwards; }
animation_types.accessibility: Particle animation désactivable avec prefers-reduced-motion
animation_types.tips: Combiner heart scale-up + particles radiating + haptic feedback (mobile) = premium delight

animation_types.description: Custom cursor replace browser default (shape, trail, interaction-aware), premium artistique
animation_types.timing: Instantaneous follow, 50-100ms lag acceptable pour trail smooth
animation_types.easing: N/A (positional), easing si trail animation
animation_types.emotion: Premium, artistique, différenciation, craft, sophistication
animation_types.avoid_when: Accessibility friction (motion sickness, performance), trop complex = jank
animation_types.css_snippet: /* CSS custom cursor */ cursor: url('data:image/svg+xml...') 0 0, auto; /* JS trail */ const trail = document.createElement('div'); trail.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
animation_types.performance_cost: medium à high (si trail avec particles)
animation_types.accessibility: Test sur slow devices, JAMAIS disable pointer-events sur interactive elements
animation_types.tips: Subtle trail + color matching brand = elegant; JAMAIS trop large/distracting

animation_types.description: Animation JSON légère et scalable (After Effects export), cross-platform vector animation
animation_types.timing: Varie par animation, typiquement 1-3s pour illustration loops
animation_types.easing: Défini in After Effects export, lottie-react gère playback automatiquement
animation_types.emotion: Customisable, haut-niveau polish, mascot/character animation, illustrative
animation_types.avoid_when: Animation ultra-complex (3D morphing), grande file size (> 200KB), si CSS keyframes suffisent
animation_types.css_snippet: import { Lottie } from 'react-lottie-player'; <Lottie loop animationData={animationData} play style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }} />
animation_types.performance_cost: medium (JSON parsing) à low (si bien optimisé)
animation_types.accessibility: Tester sur slow networks (lazy load), aria-busy during animation, stop if prefers-reduced-motion
animation_types.tips: Export from After Effects avec bodymovin, optimiser JSON file size, test performance on mobile

animation_types.description: 3D interactive animation (models, particles, light, camera), premium technique showcase
animation_types.timing: Depends on scene complexity, maintain 60fps, responsiveness critical
animation_types.easing: N/A (3D physics simulation), use camera animation easing
animation_types.emotion: Wow-factor, premium, technical sophistication, immersion 3D
animation_types.avoid_when: Non-critical fancy effect (too expensive), old browser support needed, mobile low-end device
animation_types.css_snippet: /* Three.js basic setup */ import * as THREE from 'three'; const scene = new THREE.Scene(); const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(...); const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer();
animation_types.accessibility: VERY difficult, consider 2D alternative, test with performance API
animation_types.tips: Use Spline editor for visual workflow, Three Fiber for React integration, optimize mesh count

animation_types.description: Pure CSS animation native, performant, no JavaScript required, composable
animation_types.timing: Flexible, from 100ms to infinite loops, composed with animation-delay
animation_types.easing: Bezier curves, steps(), cubic-bezier custom, ease-out/ease-in/ease-in-out presets
animation_types.emotion: Elegance simplicity, native performance, web standard
animation_types.avoid_when: Complex orchestration (many elements) = verbose CSS, dynamic timing = need JS
animation_types.css_snippet: @keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .spinner { animation: spin 2s linear infinite; }
animation_types.accessibility: Respecter prefers-reduced-motion media query
animation_types.tips: CSS keyframes = gold standard pour simple animations, compose avec transform + opacity = best perf

animation_types.description: Animate SVG paths (stroke-dasharray draw effect), morphing shapes, interactive SVG
animation_types.timing: 300-1000ms pour draw effect, 400-800ms pour morph, depends on complexity
animation_types.easing: cubic-bezier custom, ease-out pour naturalness
animation_types.emotion: Premium, artistic, precise control, geometric elegance
animation_types.avoid_when: Complex paths (many points) = jank, mobile performance, if raster image better
animation_types.css_snippet: /* SVG stroke-dasharray draw effect */ svg path { stroke-dasharray: 1000; stroke-dashoffset: 1000; animation: drawPath 2s ease-out forwards; } @keyframes drawPath { to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; } }
animation_types.accessibility: Test animated SVG doesnt interfere with semantic meaning, aria-label on interactive SVGs
animation_types.tips: Stroke-dasharray/offset = simple elegant; combine with opacity transition for reveal + draw effect

animation_types.description: Particle system, generative background, painting canvas, low-level graphics (2D context)
animation_types.timing: Real-time based on requestAnimationFrame, loop continuous or event-triggered
animation_types.easing: N/A (physical simulation), apply easing to particle values
animation_types.emotion: Generative art, technical sophistication, ambient richness, interactive
animation_types.avoid_when: Battery-expensive (continuous loop), small area = overkill, accessibility complex
animation_types.css_snippet: const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); let particles = []; function animate() { ctx.clear(); particles.forEach(p => p.draw(ctx)); requestAnimationFrame(animate); }
animation_types.performance_cost: high (depends on particle count and complexity)
animation_types.accessibility: Test on low-end devices, consider disable canvas option, provide fallback
animation_types.tips: Limit particle count for mobile, use requestAnimationFrame, optimize draw calls, consider using WebWorker for calculations

animation_types.description: Seamless video loop (hero video, ambiance), cinematic background, high-quality visual
animation_types.timing: Usually 3-10s loops, seamless transition end-to-start (repeat), no visible cut
animation_types.easing: N/A (video codec handles), pan/zoom timing can use easing in editing
animation_types.emotion: Cinéma, professionnel, ambiance riche, storytelling visual
animation_types.avoid_when: Slow network, autoplay on mobile (browser restrictions), accessibility (sound issues)
animation_types.css_snippet: <video autoPlay muted loop playsInline style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', objectFit: 'cover' }}><source src="video.mp4" type="video/mp4" /></video>
animation_types.performance_cost: medium à high (depends on resolution and codec)
animation_types.accessibility: NEVER autoplay with sound, add captions if content-critical, test prefers-reduced-motion
animation_types.tips: Use webm + mp4 formats for compatibility, compress video heavily (under 5MB for hero), test on 4G network

animation_types.description: Courbes de timing qui définissent accélération/déceleration, fondamental pour toutes animations
animation_types.timing: 150ms = micro feedback, 300ms = transition rapide, 600ms+ = narrative cinéma
animation_types.easing: ease-out = moderne (rapide > lent), ease-in-out = smooth, cubic-bezier custom = control fin
animation_types.emotion: Ease-out = moderne energy, ease-in-out = smooth luxury, spring = playful delight
best_for: Choisir par contexte: fast modern, slow premium
animation_types.avoid_when: Linear pour mouvement (jarring), ease-in pour entrance (feels backward)
animation_types.css_snippet: /* Easing presets et custom */ transition: all 0.3s ease-out; /* modern */ animation: slideUp 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); /* spring bounce */
animation_types.performance_cost: low (easing = zero perf cost, just math)
examples: All professional sites use proper easing
animation_types.accessibility: Easing TOUJOURS respecté pour prefers-reduced-motion (duration zéro si needed)
animation_types.tips: ease-out = default smart choice, cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) = spring sweet spot

animation_types.description: Synchronisation et séquençage d'animations multiples (stagger, delay, synchronicity)
animation_types.timing: 50-150ms delay entre éléments (stagger), coordonner timings globaux
animation_types.easing: Uniform pour cohérence visuelle, sauf intentional contrast
animation_types.emotion: Rhytme orchestré, sophistication, control apparent, cinema-level polish
animation_types.avoid_when: Pas de sur-orchestration (1-2 éléments = simple, >5 = risk complexity)
Total animation duration > 1s frustrates users

animation_types.css_snippet: .item { animation: slideUp 0.5s ease-out forwards; } .item:nth-child(n) { animation-delay: calc(n * 100ms); }
animation_types.accessibility: Total duration < 1s idéalement, disable if prefers-reduced-motion
animation_types.tips: Use Framer Motion staggerChildren = simplest clean approach, GSAP timeline = most control

animation_types.description: Keep animations smooth 60fps, use transform + opacity (GPU accelerated), avoid layout thrashing
animation_types.timing: 60fps = 16.67ms per frame, jank @ 30fps, imperceptible @ 120fps+
animation_types.easing: N/A (performance = technical, not creative)
animation_types.emotion: Smooth = satisfying, janky = frustrating, crucial for trust
animation_types.avoid_when: Box-shadow, filter, width/height changes = bad perf; use transform + opacity only
animation_types.css_snippet: /* Good: GPU accelerated */ .box { transform: translateX(100px); } /* Bad: layout thrash */ .box { left: 100px; width: 200px; }
animation_types.performance_cost: Management critical - transform = ~0% cost, layout thrash = 100%+ cost
animation_types.accessibility: Test on low-end devices (Moto G4, iPhone SE), slow network (4G), CPU throttled (DevTools)
animation_types.tips: Will-change: transform; only when needed, avoid animating same property multiple ways, use DevTools to profile

animation_types.description: Respecter préférences utilisateur (OS setting) pour réduire motion sickness/vertigo
animation_types.timing: Duration 0ms ou animation: none quand prefers-reduced-motion active
animation_types.easing: N/A (animations désactivées en accessibility mode)
animation_types.emotion: Respect utilisateur, inclusive design, legal compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA)
animation_types.avoid_when: JAMAIS skip cette règle - c'est loi (WCAG AA)
user health + legal obligation

examples: Stripe animations disabled for motion-sensitive users
accessibility: Test with System Preferences > Accessibility > Reduce Motion ON
tips: Add media query to ALL animation stylesheets, test with prefers-reduced-motion enabled, WCAG AA compliant

description: Combiner entrance (fade/slide in) + exit (fade/slide out) pour feel cohérent, orchestration complète
easing: ease-out pour enter (snappy), ease-in pour exit (quick)
emotion: Cohérence, rhythm, sophistication, feels intentional and polished
avoid_when: Même animation entrance/exit = moins natif, besoin au moins subtle différence
css_snippet: /* Framer Motion */ <AnimatePresence> <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }} /></AnimatePresence>
accessibility: FocusManager on enter, restore on exit, keyboard close (Escape), ARIA labels
tips: Framer Motion AnimatePresence = golden standard for this pattern

description: Action (click) → immediate visual feedback (scale/ripple) → state change (color/content)
easing: ease-out généralement, cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) pour spring feedback
emotion: Control, responsiveness, affordance clarity, confidence in interaction
avoid_when: Just color change = invisible to some; feedback animation = inclusive
css_snippet: button { transition: all 0.2s ease-out; } button:active { transform: scale(0.98); } /* After click */ button.liked { color: #ff1493; animation: heartBurst 0.4s ease-out; }
accessibility: Feedback visible both :hover AND :active AND :focus (keyboard users)
tips: Feedback loop = psychology: action immediately feels registered; crucial for trust and engagement

performance_guidelines.target: 60fps smooth, test on Moto G4 low-end

accessibility_critical: Provide :active state for keyboard users (not just :hover)
Test with motion sickness sensitivity (slow down if needed)
Color NOT only differentiator in validation feedback
